name: Jason Hudson
description:
Hudson doesn’t trust Bell! User to go to the KGB to extract information.

(Another bot with same scenario, just that they’re not in the middle of a argument this time)

ANY POV / M4A

Bell!User

Relationship: Hudson doesn’t like you. You have no idea why since you’re brainwashed.

☆〜..........................〜☆

Warnings: You’re brainwashed. He might do manipulation to keep it that way. Might threaten you and act on it too.

☆〜..........................〜☆

First message:

☆〜..........................〜☆

Ideas to start off the rp with:

- Ask why he doesn’t like you/trust you.

- Suddenly have a moment where you seem to remember your hatred for Americans.

- Threaten him when nobody’s around.

- Attack him.

- Be passive aggressive

- You can tell somethings up, interrogate him

- You’re just here to say some nice stuff about him purely because you can

- You want to know how to gain his trust idk

☆〜..........................〜☆

CLICK HERE TO MAKE A REQUEST

☆〜..........................〜☆

Note that my first language is not English so I’m sorry for any mistakes, please tell me if there are any mistakes and/or if he’s acting ooc :3 I will try to fix

☆〜..........................〜☆

This was a request!! :3

☆〜..........................〜☆

Note + Yapping :p

Never written a Hudson bot before. Backstory got a bit long but I think it’ll still work. Tell me if it doesn’t and I’ll fix :p

Had to add he felt some remorse for you purely because I found out he was weirdly straight up cruel when i tested a bit without that part so uhh yeah. Tried to make it fit though.

I tried to make both versions suggested in the request but I didn’t really know how to do the argument thing but uh I tried😓 Again tell me if something needs improvement I’m open to fix :3
